id.description: The unique identifier for a specific AWS instance.

ids.description: A list of unique identifiers for multiple AWS instances.

instance_tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS instances, where each tag is a key-value pair.

ipv6_addresses.description: A list of IPv6 addresses assigned to the AWS instances.

private_ips.description: A list of private IP addresses assigned to the AWS instances.

public_ips.description: A list of public IP addresses assigned to the AWS instances.
